gauge.name: Yellowstone River near Livingston

impacts.statement: Roads to mill creek, cinnebar basin and trail creek are covered with water. Water will also be over portions of yellowstone park road for 800 yards, 3.5 miles south of town, including a few farm homes. Flooding over the road to 9th street island with water reaching some homes.
Some minor overflow occurs along the lowest areas throughout the reach of the river and across the road connecting the island with the rest of town. +
Water starts to impinge on island road.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: Stage may be affected by ice during winter months.
River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 72 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued routinely during the warm season, and as needed at other times of the year.
